title: フォーゲットミーノット！

text_block_list.text: My memory... it's gone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black and I are startled by a loud yell,
and we race over to the source to find Gold Ship
with a troubled expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't find my memory from yesterday anywhere!
I've looked inside my bag and in the hollow of a
tree, but it's nowhere to be seen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
C-calm down! Is there anything we can do to
help?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sob... My poor, precious little memory. I must've gone and dropped it somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Please! You've gotta help me find my memory! If I
don't find it soon, someone might take it for
themselves!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's go and look for that memory, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of us go searching around the
school.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can sense it! It's calling out to me! The line of
gold must be around here!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So it's in this area? Got it! Let's search carefully to
see if it's fallen somewhere or gotten buried!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, all these weeds are getting in the way. Let's
weed the area while we search!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! I found a memory! Wait, this is the one
from last week when I squared off against those
Martians! This isn't the one I'm looking for!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I sure did! And what a great time it was! ♪ Okay,
let's keep going! To the next memory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Shh! Be quiet! We've gotta look for this darned
memory without it noticing us.
choice_data_list: (How can a memory even notice us, though?)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we'll be quiet. Oh, hold on, let me just tidy
up these books. They look like they're going to
topple over.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Close, but no cigar! This is tomorrow's
memory! WHOA! I'm gonna become the
president?!
choice_data_list: (The likeliness of that happening is pretty low!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! I put away the equipment that
was lying around so no one'll trip over it and get
hurt! Let's keep looking for that memory!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It's not proving easy to find, is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean I'm going to give up
looking for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Kitasan Black doesn't seem
discouraged, I begin to wonder if it's wise to let
her keep participating in this fool's errand.
choice_data_list: Do you still believe she's lost her memory?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if I believe that or not! I just
want to help Golshi out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't just ignore someone if they're in trouble.
That's why I'll stay and help her until the very end!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Kitasan, but we've looked everywhere I
can think of...
choice_data_list: Let's check around the school one more time!
We might need to ask for more help...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, it's fine... I don't want to become a prisoner
to my past. The most important thing is the time
spent here and now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't feel right to leave your memory
abandoned and lost, though... I can keep helping
you if you like.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's cool. We've killed enough ti—er, I mean... It's
all right because I've discovered something even
more important than my lost memory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That the present is more important than the past!
As thanks for teaching me this lesson, lemme give
you guys something good!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Put some salt in that and shove it under your
pillow! You're guaranteed to sleep like a baby,
Baby!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Is this some kind of charm?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But what a relief! Golshi looked like a real weight
had been taken off her shoulders!
choice_data_list: So, what does the paper say?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Lemme see... "I did it. I'm the one who did
everything"?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It would seem so. Thank you for all your
hard work.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for eavesdropping. I heard that
someone was doing good deeds around school
and wished to express my gratitude in person.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You helped weed the garden, tidy the library,
and put away audio equipment. Each task was an
issue submitted in our suggestion box.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just did all that while I was searching for
something, but I'm glad I was able to help out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even if it was done on a whim, I'm still grateful.
One good turn deserves another. This is not
much, but here is a reward for your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, these cookies look delicious! I'll divvy them
up with Golshi later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is never stingy when helping others,
and today I got to see just how big her heart
really is.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! Maybe if we ask someone else to
help—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've finally found you, Gold Ship! Yesterday,
you—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, wait right there, McQueen. Don't tell me
you're gonna ask someone with amnesia about
stuff that happened yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What's this? You have amnesia?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So you don't remember singing that weird song in
front of my bedroom last night?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nope! I don't remember doing anything like that!
choice_data_list: (Is this what this whole farce was for?!)
(Is this what this whole farce was for?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Are you dragging other people into your lies again? Listen, I didn't come here to scold you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've been having trouble falling asleep. I
was wondering what you were doing last night
when you randomly burst into song, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, hearing you sing sent me into a
deep, relaxing sleep. I meant to come and thank
you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose there's no use in that if you can't
remember doing it. I'll just take these back with
me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you want to give me something? You
should've started with that, Big Mack! Oh, my
memories have suddenly returned! It's a miracle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You greedy cur! I'm so sorry, you two. Thank you
for bearing with her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And they're gone...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm still glad Golshi was able to remember
what happened right away. That puts my mind at
ease.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black believed Gold Ship's tall tale until
the very end, and she just seems happy to have
been of help.
